title: SeriousTech
description: [Archived] Learning new technology mods with a fresh experience!
body:
[![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/KQlzuha.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/serioustech)
![Versions Supported](https://img.shields.io/badge/1.18_&_1.16_forge-white?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&labelColor=gray&color=chartreuse)
[![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/discord-white?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&labelColor=gray&color=cyan)](https://discord.com/invite/6kcN2cnzwp)
[![Other Modpacks](https://img.shields.io/badge/other%20modpacks!-white?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&labelColor=gray&color=indigo)](https://modrinth.com/user/SeriousFreezing)

One of the best modpacks focusing on: knowledge of new mods from small creators and optimization.
This modpack is based on [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), so thank you very much for your work HyperSoop!  

✅ Optimized and lightweight compared to other modpacks!

✅ Bring different ways to create automated systems!

✅ It fixes many problems and brings many tweaks!

✅ Around 120 mods! (Minimum: 3GB)

✅ Support for Linux and MacOS!

[![BiscetHosting](https://i.imgur.com/EBh5OPp.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/SeriousFreezing)
